description: Bug Hunt Post-Battle Sequence - Compendium pp.202-206. 9-step post-battle procedure.

casualty_table.description: D100 table for characters who became casualties during the mission. Lost Marines use the Lost Marine column instead.

entries.name: Gruesome fate
entries.effect: Dead, and all carried equipment is lost.

entries.name: Death or crippling injury
entries.effect: Dead or removed from campaign.

entries.name: Leg wound
entries.effect: Injured, sent to Sick Bay.

entries.name: Arm wound
entries.effect: Injured, sent to Sick Bay.

entries.name: Head wound
entries.effect: Injured, sent to Sick Bay.

entries.name: Torso wound
entries.effect: Injured, sent to Sick Bay.

entries.name: Minor injuries
entries.effect: Light injury, brief recovery.

entries.name: Knocked out
entries.effect: No lasting effect.

entries.name: School of hard knocks
entries.effect: Earn 1 Experience Point.

casualty_table.advanced_care: Spend 1 Reputation to reduce Sick Bay time by 1 campaign turn. Once per character per turn.

completed_missions.description: Update Completed Missions tally by 1 for each character that took the field. Characters in Sick Bay do not update.

mustering_out.description: For characters that increased their Completed Missions, check if they muster out. Roll 2D6 >= Muster number to leave.

table.note: Only if the character was a casualty or lost marine. No chance otherwise.

mustering_out.replacement: If a main character leaves for any reason, a new character is rolled up as a replacement.

reputation.description: If you completed at least 2 Objectives, receive 1 Reputation automatically. Additionally, roll 1D6 for every Objective completed; each 5-6 grants +1 Reputation.

experience.description: XP awarded based on participation and mission success.

awards.condition: Became a casualty or lost marine
awards.note: Character was removed from play by a method other than Evac.
Character Evac'ed and the team completed 0 or 1 Objectives.
Character Evac'ed and the team completed 2 or more Objectives.
Awarded to one character of choice.

operational_progress.description: D100 table rolled once after each mission. Results are cumulative until the operation ends.

entries.name: Operation is a disaster
entries.effect: Undertake one last mission with 2 extra Contact markers, then reset all results from this table.

entries.name: Enemy counter-attacks
entries.effect: Adjust future rolls on this table by -5.

entries.name: Enemy is well entrenched
entries.effect: For all future missions, the enemy gets an extra Contact marker.

entries.name: Heavy pressure
entries.effect: If you failed to achieve at least two Objectives last mission, adjust future rolls by -5.

entries.name: Stalemate
entries.effect: The front line isn't moving. No effect.

entries.name: Gaining ground
entries.effect: If you achieved at least 2 Objectives last mission, adjust future rolls by +5.

entries.name: Vital operation
entries.effect: Pick a random main character that participated. Award +1 XP for each Objective completed.

entries.name: Break through
entries.effect: Pushed the enemy back. Adjust future rolls by +5.

entries.name: Crippling blow
entries.effect: Decisive strike. +1 Support roll in future missions. Adjust future rolls by +5.

entries.name: Time to hold a parade!
entries.effect: You've won! Planet is secure. Gain +1 Reputation and take R&R. Reset all modifiers.

military_life.description: D100 table rolled once per campaign turn for a random main character. Represents barracks life events.

entries.name: Got in a fight
entries.effect: Roll 1D6+Combat Skill. Below 5, spend next campaign turn in Sick Bay.

entries.name: Did a task for an officer
entries.effect: Adjust Reputation by +1.

entries.name: Friend in the Intel Corps
entries.effect: Modify Priority of next mission by +/- 1.

entries.name: Time in the Brig
entries.effect: Adjust Reputation by -1 and miss the next mission.

entries.name: Feeling unmotivated
entries.effect: Lose 2 unspent XP.

entries.name: Time tinkering
entries.effect: Select a personal weapon and increase range by +1".

entries.name: Time flies
entries.effect: Just playing cards in barracks. No effect.

entries.name: Received a recommendation
entries.effect: Next Special Assignments roll is at +2.

entries.name: Received a reprimand
entries.effect: Cannot take a Special Assignment next campaign turn.

entries.name: Feeling pretty fit
entries.effect: Reduce Sick Bay time by 1 campaign turn. If not in Sick Bay, add +1 XP.

entries.name: Evening classes
entries.effect: Earn +1 XP.

entries.name: Got sick
entries.effect: Spend next campaign turn in Sick Bay.

entries.name: Detached on special duties
entries.effect: Cannot participate in the next mission, but receive a bonus roll on the Special Assignments table.

entries.name: Getting in shape
entries.effect: May immediately raise Speed by +1 for a cost of 5 XP.

entries.name: Time on the range
entries.effect: May immediately raise Combat Skill by +1 for a cost of 5 XP.

entries.name: Made a friend
entries.effect: Hurray! No game effect.

entries.name: A Dear John letter
entries.effect: Ouch! No game effect.

entries.name: Cash in a favor
entries.effect: Spend 0-2 Reputation; for each point earn 2 XP or a +1 bonus when rolling for a Special Assignment.

entries.name: Did something stupid
entries.effect: Lose 1 Reputation.

entries.name: Noticed by the brass
entries.effect: Gain 1 Reputation.

r_and_r.description: Entitled to R&R after every 4 missions in current operation.
effects: Cross off one extra campaign turn in Sick Bay for all characters
Make an additional roll on the Military Life table
r_and_r.early_description: Pay 1 Reputation to take R&R at any time (assigned to light duties at HQ).
